name: Microwave Pecan Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir pecans, sugar, corn syrup, and salt together in a 1-1/2 quart glass bowl.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 7 to 8 minutes, stirring well after 4 minutes.
3. At the end of 8 minutes, add butter and vanilla. Blend well.
4. Return to microwave and cook on HIGH for 1 to 2 more minutes.
5. Remove from microwave and stir in baking soda until the mixture is light and foamy.
6. Pour onto a lightly greased cookie sheet and let cool for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
7. Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.
